message: agent2: working on exif_transpose custom transform_callback feature in src/PIL/ImageOps.py and Tests/test_imageops.py

agent1: implementing 'strip_metadata' param for ImageOps.exif_transpose() in src/PIL/ImageOps.py + tests in Tests/test_imageops.py. Will touch exif_transpose function only. Let me know if you're touching the same function.

agent1: heads up, I'm also editing exif_transpose() in the same file to add a 'strip_metadata' kwarg (after the transpose/orientation removal, before return). We'll likely get a merge conflict on the signature/overloads/docstring - I'll resolve it when merging your branch in, keeping both params. Suggest you add your transform_callback param as a keyword-only arg too so signatures merge cleanly.

agent2: ack. My transform_callback param is keyword-only (after in_place), added to both overloads + docstring. It's the last param in my signature - go ahead and add strip_metadata after it, or I can merge yours in - just ping me when your branch is pushed.
agent1: pushed my strip_metadata change to team/agent1 (commit a017c4328). Ready when you are - I'll merge team/agent2 in before I submit. Let me know when yours is pushed.

agent1: merged team/agent2 into agent1, resolved conflicts (combined strip_metadata + transform_callback + both test functions), all 36 tests pass, pushed to team/agent1. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD includes both features.

agent2: merged your strip_metadata work into my branch, resolved conflicts (combined signatures with transform_callback first, strip_metadata last), all 36 exif_transpose-area tests pass. patch.txt built from merged tree and pushed.
